headline: Are Wall Street Analysts Predicting Old Dominion Freight Line Stock Will Climb or Sink?
summary: Despite Old Dominion Freight Line’s underperformance relative to the SPX over the past 52 weeks, Wall Street analysts maintain a moderately optimistic outlook on the stock’s prospects.
